testcase.name: test_check_returns_402_for_free_tier
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter17_content_suggest.py:87: in test_check_returns_402_for_free_tier assert r.status_code == 402, f"expected 402 got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 402 got 404: {"detail":"Proposal not found"} E assert 404 == 402 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
